chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Completion of the walker’s Journey

text: 2791 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّ مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ إِلَى بَيْتِ اَللَّهِ حَافِياً مَشَى فَإِذَا تَعِبَ رَكِبَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2791 - It is narrated: "Whoever makes a vow to walk to the House of Allah (swt) barefoot should walk, but if they become tired, they may ride."
